case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. VICTOR MANUEL OLIVA HERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $738.97 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, VICTOR MANUEL OLIVA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT VICTOR MANUEL OLIVA HERNANDEZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED SEP-16-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, VICTOR MANUEL OLIVA
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
